scenario.name: IMS AKA Register
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field0] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch];rport Max-Forwards: 70 From: <[field1]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <[field1]>;expires=3600;+g.3gpp.icsi-ref="urn:urn-7:3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel" Expires: 3600 Supported: path, outbound, gruu Allow: INVITE, ACK, OPTIONS, CANCEL, BYE, UPDATE, PRACK P-Preferred-Identity: [field1] P-Preferred-Service: urn:urn-7:3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=234150999010203 Security-Client: tls; port=5061 Authorization: Digest username="[field2]", realm="", nonce="", uri="sip:[field0]", response="" Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[field0] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch];rport Max-Forwards: 70 From: <[field1]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <[field1]>;expires=3600;+g.3gpp.icsi-ref="urn:urn-7:3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel" Expires: 3600 Supported: path, outbound, gruu Allow: INVITE, ACK, OPTIONS, CANCEL, BYE, UPDATE, PRACK P-Preferred-Identity: [field1] P-Preferred-Service: urn:urn-7:3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=234150999010203 Security-Client: tls; port=5061 [authentication] Content-Length: 0
